ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size. */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label for the clothing size (e.g., XS, S, M). */,
  "uk_size" INTEGER /* Size in the UK standard. */,
  "us_size" INTEGER /* Size in the US standard. */,
  "eu_size_germany" INTEGER /* Size in the EU standard (Germany). */,
  "eu_size_france" INTEGER /* Size in the EU standard (France). */,
  "russia_size" TEXT /* Size in the Russian standard. */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Type of size (e.g., Women, Men, Kids). */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the size. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product. */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product (e.g., T-shirt, Jeans). */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category to which the product belongs. */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the clothing item. */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product. */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product. */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image. */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record. */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product this inventory record is related to. */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size this inventory record corresponds to. */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product available in that size. */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region where this inventory is stored. */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the inventory was updated. */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Minimum quantity to trigger a reorder. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region. */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., US, EU, UK). */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the region. */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Time zone of the region. */,
  "currency_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the currency (e.g., $, €). */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale. */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product sold. */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of the product sold. */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity sold. */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale. */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the sale occurred. */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue from the sale. */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the sale. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user. */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user. */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user. */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., inventory manager, store associate). */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user. */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store the user is associated with. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversion_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion log. */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being converted. */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size being converted. */,
  "conversion_date" TEXT /* Date of the conversion action. */,
  "source_region" TEXT /* Region from which the size is being converted. */,
  "target_region" TEXT /* Region to which the size is converted. */,
  "converted_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the conversion. */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments on the conversion. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_logs_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_logs_converted_by FOREIGN KEY ("converted_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category. */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category. */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category. */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category for hierarchical categorization. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_inventory" (
  "region_inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region inventory record. */,
  "Inventory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the inventory record. */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the inventory is stored. */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product available in that region. */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the region inventory was updated. */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Minimum quantity to trigger a reorder in the region. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_inventory_Inventory_id FOREIGN KEY ("Inventory_id") REFERENCES inventory ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_inventory_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)
